title: Astral Vinery
description: Improves on the Vinery mod in some ways for the Create: Astral modpack
body:
Similarly to the [Per Aspera](https://modrinth.com/mod/per-aspera) mod, this mod is intended to be part of the [Create: Astral](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-astral) modpack. 

In the future it may add more features, e.g. more sorts of wine, however right now this is just a collection of small bugfixes/minor improvements that the developers of said modpack felt were missing/needed.

Current additions/features/fixes:

- Fixed cooking pot GUI not opening
- Added REI Integration for Vinery Recipes (Will be removed when eventually updating to 1.19+, as Vinery added its own REI compat in newer versions)
- Fixed Vinery blocks crashing the game when built by a Create Schematicannon

As it is intended to be part of a modpack, the minecraft version in use will match the modpack. Right now this means Fabric 1.18.2.
